_comment: SUPPLEMENTAL eligibility overlay — facts NOT in the GCFB source (e.g. gathered from a facility's own flyer), keyed by GCFB location id. Restrictions that ARE in GCFB's notes are parsed automatically (see lib/restricted-area.ts) and marked source='gcfb-parsed'; entries here override those and are marked source='overlay'. Open-to-all is the safe default. Verify before adding — a false restriction can wrongly turn people away.

263.note: Food pantry: must live in 44102, 44113, or 44109. Bring ID and proof of address. Household income must be under 200% of the federal poverty level. (From the facility's flyer, not in GCFB data.)
